Dragon Roaster.title: Page 20 — Lingyi Zhou
Dragon Roaster.description: Welcome to the interactive portfolio of Lingyi Zhou — a full-stack developer, creative technologist, and game designer. Explore a collection of immersive VR experiences, experimental web applications, and AI-integrated tools that blend technical depth with playful interaction. From gesture-driven magic games to large-scale automation systems, every project is crafted with code, creativity, and curiosity.
